page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 16 physical cores and 16 vCPUs, paired with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core. The hardware configuration includes a bundled 3839 GB local SSD storage volume and a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates average multi-core CPU and memory performance. The stress-ng multi-core test, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU scores all fall within the average tier. However, single-core performance is relatively weak, as evidenced by bottom-quartile results in single-core stress-ng and single-threaded gzip compression tests. Memory bandwidth is stable, with cached small-block reads reaching 781.6 GB/sec and uncached large-block reads at 88.96 GB/sec.

Given the substantial 3839 GB local SSD storage and 128.0 GB of RAM, this instance is optimized for storage-intensive and database workloads. It achieves average performance in Redis SET operations and database operations, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for applications requiring high local storage capacity and moderate compute power without the premium of GPU acceleration. Appropriate workloads include relational databases, NoSQL stores, and localized data processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.4xlarge is an x86_64 server configured with a dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY processor offering 16 physical cores and 16 vCPUs at 2.5 GHz. It features 128.0 GB of RAM and a bundled 3839 GB local SSD, supported by a 6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier for multi-core compute, memory bandwidth, and database operations, though single-core execution speeds are relatively weak. Lacking a GPU, it relies on CPU-based execution, demonstrating average throughput in Redis operations and small-model LLM inference. The high local storage capacity and 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio make this instance qualitatively cost-effective for storage-heavy and memory-intensive applications. It is highly suited for database hosting, web serving, and distributed data store workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.4xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and a bundled 3839 GB local SSD, optimized for database and storage-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3.4xlarge features 16 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 3839 GB of local SSD storage for database and storage-heavy workloads.
tagline: A storage-dense virtual server featuring dedicated Intel processors, balanced memory, and high-capacity local SSD storage for data-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 128 GB RAM
Average multi-core CPU and database benchmark performance
Suited for databases, NoSQL stores, and web serving
